title: Sarcochilus obtusus
taxonomy: Sarcochilus obtusus is a species of orchid, belonging to the genus Sarcochilus, which is a part of the family Dipterocarpaceae, but more commonly associated with the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its taxonomic position within the plant kingdom. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is known to thrive in warm and humid environments. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Sarcochilus obtusus is closely related to other species of orchids. Further classification of the species may involve subcategories such as genus, species, and subspecies.
